name: Siren's Sway
description: This model gains the following trigger on all actions printed on its stat card:
extraction_notes: This upgrade grants a universal trigger to all actions on the model's stat card. The trigger details are:
Timing: This trigger must be declared, if able
Effect: Immediately, this action fails. This model declares an action chosen and controlled by the opposing player. This model may discard a card to discard this upgrade.
Note: This trigger is not a standard granted action but rather modifies existing actions on the equipped model's stat card. The format doesn't perfectly capture this universal trigger mechanic.
